title: DZingy Indian Citrus Smoke-Dried Curry
description: A citrusy, juicy, energizing indian dish featuring thai green curry paste, smoke-cold, gluten-free-friendly, vessel=mason-jar.

ingredients.name: Fresh Citrus Squeeze (like yuzu or lime)

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add curry paste and sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant but not burnt.
Add chicken and brown on all sides. Add lemon juice and cook until chicken is fully cooked, about 5 minutes more.
In another saucepan, bring water and rice to a boil, reduce heat, cover, and simmer until tender (about 30 minutes).
When the rice is done, add it into the skillet with the chicken. Mix well.
Serve hot as a side dish or in a mason jar for on-the-go lunches.
